--- Page 5 ---

4.7 If you choose any college, how much is the college fee?:** 37000 per year

**4.8 If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it?:** Identified a part-time job to fill any shortfall

**4.9 If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees?:** Ready to work extra hours to meet the college fee expenses.

**5.1 Does the student have any health issues?:** 
- [●] Yes 
- [○] No

**5.2 If yes, list the health issues:** 


--- Page 6 ---

### Section 6 — Student Commitment

**6.1 Will you study college for three years without any obstacle?:** Very committed and very determined to finish college and a good job

**6.2 If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come?:** 
- [●] Yes 
- [○] No 
- [●] Maybe

**6.3 Are you ready to send your son/daughter to weekly skill development classes on Sundays (16 classes a year)?:** 
- [●] Yes 
- [○] No

--- Page 6 ---

### Section 7 — Scholarship Information

**

--- Page 6 ---

7.1 Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree?:** No

--- Page 6 ---

### Section 8 — Volunteer Observation

**8.1 What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition?:** Parents are uneducated and striving a lot to educate their kids.

**8.2 Will you recommend this student for this scholarship?:** 
- [●] Yes 
- [○] No 
- [○] Not Sure

**8.3 Any other comments you want to share?:** Attending a deserving candidate. He has already spoken to a company for a part-time job. He wants to help his father form further burden.
